Web Page Load Time represents the time it takes for popular global websites to load during CQoE (Consumer Quality of Experience) tests.
CDN Latency is a measure of latency to popular Content Delivery Networks.

Cloud infrastructure latency is a measure of latency to popular cloud service providers.
